title: Contact | Anna Dixon MP for Shipley
meta_description: Contact Anna Dixon MP, the MP for Shipley, for any constituency-related inquiries. Find contact details, including email, phone number, and mailing address, to reach Anna
text_excerpt: --> Contact | Anna Dixon MP for Shipley top of page ​Anna Dixon MP Home About Me Contact Surgeries and Advice Neighbourhood Survey Anna's Visits My Priorities Latest News Speeches and Questions Email Sign Up Privacy Policy Acceptable Behaviour Policy More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Contact Me Get in touch If you are a resident of the Shipley constituency and would like to contact Anna Dixon MP, you can reach me through the following channels: anna.dixon.mp@parliament.uk 01274 790279 House of Commons, London, SW1 0AA Surgeries and Advice © 2024 by Office of Anna Dixon MP.
